reference: Hi, I fell off a ladder at work last September and I broke the talus bone. I was in a cast for two months and in a boot for one month. I still have pain, and we found out by MRI that I have fluid in the bone. What does that mean? How long does it take to recover from that? What is the right treatment for it?
text: Hi, I fell off a ladder at work last September and I broke the talus bone. I was in a cast for two months and in a boot for one month. I still have pain, and we found out by MRI that I have fluid in the bone. What does that mean? How long does it take to recover from that? What is the right treatment for it?
